business.name: AutoDrive Salisbury Plain
business.tagline: Professional automotive expertise delivered with precision at our Salisbury Plain workshop. Quality service, every time.
business.hero_heading: Adelaide's Trusted One-Stop Automotive Care Centre
business.hero_subheading: Car Servicing • Repairs • Diagnostics • Used Car Sales • Detailing

address_secondary.full: 779-781 North East Road, Valley View SA 5093

about.section_subtitle: Expert Auto Care You Can Trust
about.body: At AutoDrive Salisbury Plain, we provide professional automotive expertise within our state-of-the-art workshop. Our fully equipped facility ensures your vehicle receives top-quality care—from routine maintenance and logbook servicing to complex diagnostics and major repairs—all performed with precision and care. Whether it's a high-performance luxury vehicle or a reliable daily driver, our certified mechanics use the latest technology and premium parts to keep you on the road safely. We proudly serve customers across Adelaide's northern suburbs — from the Adelaide CBD through Mawson Lakes, Salisbury, Elizabeth, Munno Para, Playford, Angle Vale, Riverlea, Virginia, Blakeview and up to Gawler.

points.title: Certified Technicians
points.description: Factory-trained experts for all makes and models

services.title: Used Car Sales
services.description: Hand-picked, high-quality vehicles you can trust. Every car undergoes a rigorous mechanical inspection and comes with warranty options for your peace of mind.

services.title: Log Book Servicing
services.description: Maintain your manufacturer's warranty with certified servicing. We follow strict factory guidelines using quality parts.

services.title: Standard & Minor Service
services.description: Professional maintenance for everyday reliability. Includes oil change, filter replacement, and a comprehensive safety check.

services.title: Brake Repair & Service
services.description: Safety first. Our expert brake services include inspections, adjustments, and replacement of pads, rotors, and fluids.

services.title: Car Air Conditioning Service
services.description: Stay cool all year round. We provide gas recharges, leak detection, and full system repairs for all vehicle makes.

services.title: Mechanical Repairs & Diagnosis
services.description: From complex engine issues to transmission repairs. Our certified mechanics use advanced diagnostics to find and fix faults.

services.title: Fuel Injector Service
services.description: Optimise your engine's performance and fuel efficiency. We offer professional cleaning and flow-testing for fuel systems.

services.title: Radiator & Cooling System
services.description: Prevent engine overheating. We provide cooling system flushes, radiator repairs, and thermostat replacements.

services.title: Suspension & Steering
services.description: Smooth handling and safe control. We specialize in shocks, struts, power steering, and wheel alignments.

services.title: Exhausts & Batteries
services.description: Essential systems care. We offer exhaust repairs and replacements alongside high-performance battery testing and fitting.

services.title: Regular Servicing
services.description: Protect your investment. Regular servicing improves safety, prevents costly repairs, and maintains your car's resale value.

services.title: Paint Correction
services.description: Restore your vehicle's paintwork by removing swirl marks, scratches, and oxidation. We bring back the deep gloss and clarity of your car's finish.

services.title: Ceramic Coating
services.description: Provide long-lasting protection for your paint against UV rays, chemicals, and dirt. Achieve a hydrophobic finish that keeps your car cleaner for longer.

services.title: Interior Detailing
services.description: Deep cleaning and conditioning of all interior surfaces. We treat leather, shampoo upholstery/carpets, and sanitize every corner for a fresh cabin.

services.title: Pre-Sale Detailing
services.description: Maximize your vehicle's resale value with our comprehensive pre-sale package. We meticulously clean and prep your car to look its absolute best for buyers.

services.title: Headlight Restoration
services.description: Improve visibility and safety by restoring cloudy, yellowed headlights to their original clarity. Enhances the look of your vehicle instantly.

services.title: Engine Bay Detailing
services.description: A thorough clean and degrease of your engine compartment, followed by dressing of plastics and hoses. Keeps your engine looking like new and makes spotting leaks easier.

services.title: Window Tinting
services.description: Professional window tint installation for enhanced privacy, UV protection, and heat reduction inside your vehicle. Available in various shades.

services.title: Minor Cosmetic Improvement
services.description: Touch-ups for stone chips, small scratch repairs, and trim restoration. Perfect for addressing those little imperfections that detract from your car's look.

services.title: Premium Hand Wash
services.description: A gentle, careful hand wash using premium pH-neutral soaps and microfiber mitts to prevent swirl marks. Includes wheel cleaning and tyre dressing.

used_car_sales.description: Looking for a reliable used car? At AutoDrive Salisbury Plain, we offer a carefully selected range of quality pre-owned vehicles. Every car in our inventory undergoes a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our high standards. From compact city cars to family SUVs, we have options to suit every budget and lifestyle. All our vehicles come with detailed service history, and we provide transparent information about their condition. Our experienced team can guide you through the selection process and help you find the perfect vehicle that fits your needs and budget.

selling_points.title: 3 Months Free Registration
selling_points.description: Drive away with peace of mind

selling_points.title: Post-Sale Support
selling_points.description: We offer discounted repairs for our customers

reviews.name: Olivia Williams
reviews.text: I was so impressed with the professional service at AutoDrive. I dropped my car off for a full service, and the team was incredibly thorough and communicative. Top-quality work and very fairly priced. Highly recommend for any mechanical needs!

reviews.name: James Thompson
reviews.text: Started using AutoDrive for my logbook servicing and I'm saving a lot compared to what the dealership used to charge. The mechanics really know their stuff and always explain exactly what's been done. Great local service.

reviews.name: Sarah Jenkins
reviews.text: Had a complex brake issue that two other shops couldn't quite pin down. The team at AutoDrive diagnosed it quickly and fixed it the same day. Transparent pricing and exceptional expertise. I wouldn't go anywhere else now.

reviews.name: David Miller
reviews.text: As a car enthusiast, I'm very picky about who touches my vehicle. AutoDrive did a performance tune and major maintenance on my sports car, and the results were fantastic. Their attention to detail is top-notch.

homepage_cta_section.heading: Reach Out To Us
homepage_cta_section.body: Strange noises? Warning lights? Unusual vibrations? Don't wait until it's too late. Regular maintenance and timely repairs can save you thousands in the long run.

footer.tagline: Professional automotive expertise delivered with precision at our Salisbury Plain workshop. Quality service, every time.
